disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A single large scaly plaque appeared on the trunk roughly one week before the widespread eruption (herald-patch pattern).
trigger_question_examples: Can you talk me through how the rash started and changed over time?
Did the first patch look different or come before the rest?
Tell me about that first big spot — when did it appear compared to the others?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, there was one bigger patch first — about a week before the rest. It was oval and scaly and I honestly thought it was just a dry patch, so I ignored it. Then a couple of days ago all the little ones came up everywhere.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A mild viral prodrome (fatigue, mild sore throat) occurred roughly two weeks before the rash.
trigger_question_examples: Were you unwell at all in the couple of weeks before the rash — a cold, sore throat or feeling run down?
Any recent viral illness before this started?
Did you have any fatigue or sore throat before the rash appeared?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — about two weeks ago I did feel a bit run down with a mild sore throat for a few days. I didn't think much of it, it passed on its own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The rash is confined to the trunk and proximal limbs and spares the face, palms and soles.
trigger_question_examples: Is the rash anywhere on your palms, the soles of your feet, or your face?
Can you check your hands and feet — any marks on your palms or soles?
Where exactly is the rash, and where is it NOT?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's all on my trunk and the tops of my arms and thighs. My face is clear, and I just checked — nothing on my palms or the soles of my feet.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It's mainly on my body I think.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new prescription, over-the-counter or recreational medication was started in the weeks before the rash.
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medicines, tablets or supplements in the last few weeks?
Any new medications, antibiotics or over-the-counter products recently?
Did you take anything new before the rash came on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing new at all. I don't take any regular tablets and I haven't started anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No systemic toxicity — denies fever, joint pain, mouth ulcers and genital ulcers.
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fever, joint pains, or sores in your mouth or genitals?
Any ulcers in your mouth or on your genitals, or feeling feverish and achy?
Are you feeling unwell in yourself at all — fevers, aches, mouth sores?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers, no joint pain, and no sores in my mouth or anywhere private. Honestly apart from the itch and the worry I feel fine in myself.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The itch is mild to moderate and is aggravated by heat / hot showers.
trigger_question_examples: How itchy is it, and does anything make the itch better or worse?
Is it itchy? What sets the itching off?
Does heat or showering affect it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's itchy but not unbearable — a mild to moderate itch. It definitely flares up worse after a hot shower.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient has been aggressively applying harsh antibacterial soaps, assuming a staphylococcal infection, worsening skin dryness and irritation.
trigger_question_examples: Have you tried anything on the rash yourself so far?
What have you been washing or treating the skin with?
Have you used any soaps, creams or products on it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I assumed it was some kind of infection so I've been scrubbing it hard with a strong antibacterial soap a few times a day. It hasn't helped — if anything the skin feels drier and more irritated now.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: I read online that a rash all over your body can be a sign of an STI or something spreading internally. Is that what this is? I'm really scared.
